name: crm-bgtech
description: CRM proprietário da BG Tech para software sob demanda / serviços profissionais

scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && echo 'Stack up — backend: http://localhost:3001 | frontend: http://localhost:3000'
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.migrate:dev: cd packages/backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.migrate:deploy: cd packages/backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.seed: cd packages/backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
